flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Shoreline Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.2k → $5.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Shoreline Community College rose 20% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $12.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Shoreline Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.0k → $7.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Shoreline Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).
